global_source_leads.production_use: DEM/lidar discovery, slope, bank breaks, canyon/valley terrain, Unreal Landscape source rasters
global_source_leads.promotion_gate: Record product ids, acquisition dates, CRS, vertical datum, void review, hydrologic conditioning, channel burning, attribution, and package/LFS policy before replacing preview terrain.

global_source_leads.production_use: Flowline, tributary, catchment, and river-alignment cross-checks
global_source_leads.promotion_gate: Clip selected products into the corridor, record CRS and attribution, compare to visible imagery and guide-reviewed rapid/eddy annotations.

global_source_leads.production_use: Daily and instantaneous discharge, stage, flow percentiles, release-band sanity checks
global_source_leads.promotion_gate: Attach current station metadata, units, temporal coverage, quality flags, and guide/release interpretation before final gameplay flow bands.
global_source_leads.provider: USGS Water Services / Water Data for the Nation

global_source_leads.production_use: High-resolution U.S. aerial color, banks, bars, vegetation, water-edge masks
global_source_leads.promotion_gate: Replace sample exports with selected orthomosaic tiles or service-derived corridor rasters that record acquisition year/date, resolution, CRS, attribution, and redistribution status.
global_source_leads.provider: USDA/APFO NAIP ImageServer via The National Map

global_source_leads.production_use: Seasonal color, vegetation and water history, dry/wet comparison, cloud-screening backup
global_source_leads.promotion_gate: Record scene ids, dates, processing level, cloud score, bands used, and whether any derivative is high enough resolution for masks.

global_source_leads.production_use: Coarse cloud-screened rainforest color and seasonal preview context
global_source_leads.promotion_gate: Keep as preview/context unless a layer and resolution are explicitly approved for production derivatives with date, CRS, layer, and terms metadata.

global_source_leads.production_use: Higher-resolution cloud-screened Pacuare vegetation, river color, and mask generation
global_source_leads.promotion_gate: Record scene ids, acquisition dates, processing level, cloud score, terms, and attribution before committing derivatives.

global_source_leads.production_use: Fallback rainforest gorge terrain and slope source
global_source_leads.promotion_gate: Clip to corridor, select Costa Rica working CRS, handle vertical datum, void-review, condition channels, burn river, compare to official layers and guide review before Unreal Landscape promotion.
global_source_leads.provider: Copernicus DEM GLO-30 Public on AWS Open Data

global_source_leads.production_use: Official Costa Rica layer discovery for hydrography, imagery, protected areas, access, and possible terrain products
global_source_leads.promotion_gate: Record exact service/layer names, CRS, terms, attribution, redistribution constraints, and publication sensitivity before importing any layer.
global_source_leads.provider: Sistema Nacional de Informacion Territorial de Costa Rica / IDECORI

global_source_leads.production_use: Official Costa Rica SINIGIRH geoservice layer discovery for aforos, hydrologic units, basin context, water works, and water-use constraints
global_source_leads.promotion_gate: Record GetCapabilities metadata, layer names/titles, CRS, attributes, terms, attribution, station variables, units, and Pacuare basin relation before importing any features.

global_source_leads.production_use: Rainfall, weather, storm timing, and flash-response sanity checks
global_source_leads.promotion_gate: Record station ids, variables, units, time zone, access terms, and basin relation before replacing relative Pacuare flow bands.
global_source_leads.provider: Instituto Meteorologico Nacional de Costa Rica

global_source_leads.production_use: Potential hydrometeorological or discharge/stage context
global_source_leads.promotion_gate: Confirm public access, station relevance, variables, terms, and redistribution permission.

global_source_leads.production_use: Protected-area, conservation, sensitive-location, and publication-risk review
global_source_leads.promotion_gate: Attach exact layers or review notes before publishing detailed route geometry, access points, or screenshots of sensitive areas.

global_source_leads.production_use: Glen Canyon Dam release context for rowing flow bands and big-water feature timing
global_source_leads.promotion_gate: Attached daily total-release series is review-gated; confirm unit metadata/terms, add hourly/subdaily operations where needed, and compare against USGS Lees Ferry/downstream gauges plus guide/oarsman review before final Colorado flow presets.

global_source_leads.production_use: River trip context, launch/takeout sensitivity, route review, official media leads
global_source_leads.promotion_gate: Use for context and official-media leads only; record item-level media metadata and publication constraints before game asset use.

global_source_leads.production_use: Visual fidelity, hazard behavior, guide-seat framing, surf/flush/pin sanity, rescue visibility
global_source_leads.promotion_gate: Attach creator, date, exact or approximate reach, observed flow/rain/weather, license or permission, attribution, and allowed use before packaging or texture/material derivation.
global_source_leads.provider: First-party capture, guide/outfitter permission, official/public-domain media, or per-item Creative Commons review

global_source_leads.production_use: Official Coloma/state-park access, park map, concession/outfitter, water-safety, restriction, and publication-sensitivity source lead.
global_source_leads.promotion_gate: Use as review evidence only until exact geometry, current restrictions, media/map rights, publication sensitivity, and guide/outfitter validation are attached.

global_source_leads.production_use: County GIS lead for parcels, roads, access, public/private land, evacuation, and route-publication context.
global_source_leads.promotion_gate: Select exact layers, CRS, terms, and attribution before importing geometry or using county context as access or emergency-route authority.

global_source_leads.production_use: Official route/trip/access/publication source lead for Grand Canyon river trips.
global_source_leads.promotion_gate: Use as source review only until exact geometry, current document dates, publication sensitivity, and oarsman review are attached.

global_source_leads.production_use: Official document index for launch/take-out support references and noncommercial regulation source leads.
global_source_leads.promotion_gate: Do not present permit/legal guidance or import linked documents as assets until manual review is complete.

goal: Track the exact production geospatial, seasonal-flow, aerial, protected-access, and reference-media evidence required before South Fork American, Colorado River, and Pacuare Unreal environments can be promoted from source-aware previews to lifelike production river maps.
next_import_order: Pick South Fork American as the first full-corridor production import pilot until its source, flow, review, and lifelike capture gates are genuinely closed.
For South Fork, attach full corridor DEM/lidar plus hydrography, then produce a clipped conditioned heightfield and river/bank polygons.
Attach full-resolution aerial/satellite or orthomosaic data with acquisition metadata and derive reviewed water, vegetation, wet-rock, and bank masks.

Expand CDEC CBR/A25 flow evidence beyond the current 30-day context window and keep A25 X-flag interpretation, station-to-reach routing, legal/redistribution signoff, and guide validation attached before any flow-band promotion.
Promote only rights-cleared or first-party references into annotation records; keep social links as manual review leads.
Regenerate Unreal maps from the production corridor package and capture lifelike review frames before checking the broad production-data item complete.

aerial_or_satellite_imagery.promotion_blocker: Pilot NAIP tiles and item-level acquisition dates for July 20-21, 2022 are attached for the current envelope, but full-corridor orthomosaic/imagery selection, terms/attribution signoff, mosaic/clip, seasonal comparison, mask derivation, and guide/geospatial approval remain open before production drape use.

guide_and_reference_media_annotations.promotion_blocker: Station-aware reference annotation and rights-manifest scaffolds are attached from link-only official/public/social seeds, and annotation points are review seeds snapped to existing stationing scaffolds. No media files, thumbnails, captions, comments, audio, item-level rights, first-party capture, guide-approved station geometry, or production asset permission are recorded yet.

hydrography_and_centerline.promotion_blocker: NHD HU8 18020129 is attached as a bbox-intersected source extract with derived South Fork mainstem, preview metric stationing, fixed-width cross-section seed candidates, a preview NAIP/DEM alignment diagnostic, and generated production-import draft centerline/bank/cross-section files. The drafts are editor review artifacts only; production working-CRS review, direction confirmation, bank editing, NAIP/DEM alignment, and guide rapid/eddy annotation are still required before replacing seed centerline or cross-section geometry.

protected_area_and_access_context.promotion_blocker: South Fork access, no-publish, and evacuation/rescue review scaffolds are now attached from NHD stationing, but official access/land-status/road/trail/emergency-route layers, sensitive-location screening, and guide/local review are still required before detailed maps, screenshots, or gameplay access use.

seasonal_flow_or_release_history.promotion_blocker: The South Fork CBR/A25 30-day context, water-year-to-date seasonal review, multi-year CBR flow review, and flow-band review are attached: the multi-year review covers four complete water years plus partial WY2026, records 1439 local days peaking at or above 900 cfs, 1076 at or above 1600 cfs, and 364 at or above 3000 cfs through July 6, 2026, and flags 92 official CBR samples at or above 20000 cfs for high-flow interpretation. Promotion remains blocked on A25 X-flag interpretation, release routing, official high-flow peak review, legal/redistribution signoff, station-to-reach review, and guide/outfitter validation.

terrain_dem_or_lidar.promotion_blocker: Pilot DEM tiles and official service/item metadata are attached, including 3DEP primary item dates and NAVD 88 records for the pilot envelope, but full-corridor mosaic/clip, CRS and vertical-datum review, void review, hydrologic conditioning, channel burning, and guide/geospatial approval remain open before Landscape promotion.

water_and_vegetation_masks.promotion_blocker: Masks are deterministic preview derivatives from source imagery plus a separate NHD mainstem water prior. The prior is useful for editor alignment but agrees with stationing by construction, so reviewed orthomosaic segmentation, bank polygons, seasonal variants, wet-rock classification, and guide/geospatial approval are still required.

aerial_or_satellite_imagery.promotion_blocker: Lees Ferry pilot NAIP tiles and item-level acquisition date October 15, 2021 are attached for the current envelope, but the sample export and 2x2 NAIP drape do not cover the full rowing prototype corridor or canyon visual diversity; mosaic/clip, terms/attribution signoff, selected orthomosaics/satellite scenes, release-aware mask QA, and guide/oarsman approval remain open.

guide_and_reference_media_annotations.promotion_blocker: Station-aware reference annotation and rights-manifest scaffolds are attached from link-only official/public/social seeds, and annotation points are review seeds snapped to existing stationing scaffolds. No media files, thumbnails, captions, comments, audio, item-level rights, first-party capture, guide-approved station geometry, or production asset permission are recorded yet.

hydrography_and_centerline.promotion_blocker: Colorado production river-mile and sandbar review seed overlays are attached from the NHD stationing candidate, but official Grand Canyon river-mile stationing, release-aware water-edge/sandbar review, camp/beach sensitivity, and oarsman/geospatial approval still block production route authority.

protected_area_and_access_context.promotion_blocker: Colorado access, no-publish, camp/beach, and oarsman publication-note scaffolds are attached for review, but official launch/take-out/camp/beach/sensitive-resource geometry, current NPS operating constraints, permit/legal wording, and oarsman approval still block detailed route packages and public screenshots.

seasonal_flow_or_release_history.promotion_blocker: USBR Glen Canyon daily total-release context and release-band review are attached. In water-year 2026 to date, 194 days meet the 8000 cfs low-release planning band, 0 days meet the 12000 cfs moderate band, and 0 days meet the 18000 cfs high band; post-2000 history contains higher-release examples, but final visuals still need unit/terms confirmation, hourly/subdaily operations, Lees Ferry/downstream gauge routing, river-mile travel-time review, sandbar/wet-bank masks, and guide/oarsman approval.

terrain_dem_or_lidar.promotion_blocker: Lees Ferry pilot DEM tiles and official service/item metadata are attached, including 3DEP primary item dates and NAVD 88 records for the pilot envelope, but full-canyon mosaic/clip, CRS and vertical-datum review, tiling expansion, river-mile stationing, hydrologic conditioning, canyon-wall material breakup, and guide/oarsman review remain open.

water_and_vegetation_masks.promotion_blocker: Preview water/vegetation masks and an NHD-aligned water prior are attached, but the prior agrees with stationing by construction and is not visible-water segmentation. Release-aware sandbar, wet-bank, side-channel, shadow/cloud, and oarsman-reviewed mask classes remain required before production use.

aerial_or_satellite_imagery.promotion_blocker: Pacuare has a retained NASA GIBS/MODIS cloud-screened candidate index, cloud/shadow diagnostic, coarse production-import derivatives, official Landsat/Sentinel high-resolution scene metadata, and an explicit Landsat product access-gate review, but production still needs an approved imagery download path, full-year scene paging, manual cloud/shadow QA, CRS/band/scale review, first-party or permissioned aerial reference where needed, and guide/geospatial approval before photoreal imagery or masks are promoted.

guide_and_reference_media_annotations.promotion_blocker: Station-aware reference annotation and rights-manifest scaffolds are attached from link-only official/public/social seeds, and annotation points are review seeds snapped to existing stationing scaffolds. No media files, thumbnails, captions, comments, audio, item-level rights, first-party capture, guide-approved station geometry, or production asset permission are recorded yet.

hydrography_and_centerline.promotion_blocker: Pacuare production centerline, bank, and rapid/access stationing review drafts are attached from the Unreal preview scaffold, but official Costa Rica hydrography, CRS/axis-order/attributes, Pacuare intersections, banks, tributaries, flow/rain context, protected-area review, and guide/outfitter stationing are still required before route authority.

protected_area_and_access_context.promotion_blocker: Pacuare protected-area publication-sensitivity and access/conservation policy artifacts are attached from SNIT/SINAC/SENARA metadata and access constraints, but exact import permissions, geometry, corridor intersections, sensitive-location policy, and local guide/conservation review still block detailed route packages and public screenshots.

seasonal_flow_or_release_history.promotion_blocker: Pacuare rainfall, discharge/stage, and flash-response metadata reviews are attached, but numeric flow tuning remains blocked until station IDs/features/time series, variables, units, time zones, coverage, terms, Pacuare basin relation, rainfall-to-stage lag, unsafe-flow criteria, rescue readability, evacuation constraints, and guide/outfitter validation are attached.

terrain_dem_or_lidar.promotion_blocker: Pacuare now has coarse public/global production-import derivatives, but terrain still needs Costa Rica working CRS, vertical datum handling, clipping, void review, hydrologic conditioning, channel burning, official-layer comparison, and guide review.

water_and_vegetation_masks.promotion_blocker: Masks are coarse preview derivatives; high-resolution Landsat/Sentinel scene metadata and the Landsat access-gate review now identify candidate replacement imagery and download blockers, but production still needs approved downloads, manual cloud/shadow review, hydrography alignment, water/canopy/wet-rock/waterfall/mist segmentation, approved layer terms, and corridor intersection review.
